ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component type */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of component creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Broad category of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is critical for component functionality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_parameters" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Validation condition */,
  "message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the rule violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the template */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_components" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the template */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id", "component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "revision" TEXT /* Revision number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each component type
Broad category of the component type
Indicates if the parameter is critical for component functionality
Severity level of the rule violation
Reference to the user who created the template
Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin)
Unique identifier for each access event
Date when the component was accessed
IP address from which the access was made
Reference to the user who created the version
Reference to the user who created the revision
